post_context.title: What I wire before asking AI to write a PRD
post_context.caption_hook: Most PM teams skip the setup and wonder why AI output sounds generic.
themes: Four inputs before AI drafting: decision, user quotes, agreed metrics, explicit non-goals.
Generic AI output is usually a context routing problem, not a model problem.
The win is fewer review cycles asking what problem you're solving.
post_context.cta_question: What's the one artifact you'd never start an AI session without?
